cardSub: Job search is broken. Here's what I'm doing about it.
intro: I'm Tarique. By day I do biz dev at Brim Financial. By night I built this.
story:
Job search in fintech is broken. You apply and hear nothing. Half the listings are ghost jobs filled months ago. Descriptions read like they were written by a legal team, not the hiring manager.

I wanted to fix that.

Warm intros are the single most effective way to get hired. Everyone knows this. But actually making them happen at scale is incredibly hard. You need to know the right person, have the relationship, get the timing right. Most people never get one. I wanted to build something that changes that.

I also wanted to learn. Everyone was talking about AI and vibe coding, and I didn't want to just read about it. I wanted to build something real with it. To expand my horizons, get my hands dirty, and understand where this is all going. The best way to stay in tune with the future is to build in it.

So here we are. The machines handle the heavy lifting. Formatting, AI rewrites that cut through corporate speak, expiry tracking, the submission pipeline. Anything that can be automated, is.

But the trust stays human. Every role is reviewed before it goes live. Warm intros are facilitated by a real person. The part where someone vouches for the connection, that can't be automated. And it shouldn't be.

This whole thing was built with AI as a creative partner. And honestly, it's wild what's possible now.
bottomStrip: Automation does the heavy lifting. The trust stays human.
